assertion.value: A patent was filed by Yale University regarding the data in this study, which was licensed to Cellinfinity Bio, a Yale biotech startup founded by S.C. S.C. is also a founder or cofounder of EvolveImmune, NumericGlobal, MagicTime Med and Chen Consulting, all unrelated to this study. The other authors declare no competing interests.
